task_description: Extract all diagrams, tables, and images from the English chess book PDF and insert them into the Uzbek translation PDF at corresponding positions, then commit and push to the repository.

verification.summary: PDF generated successfully: 302 pages, 39.4 MB. 256 chess diagrams extracted and embedded at [Diagramma X.Y] positions. 26 full-page chapter dividers included. 262 total images in output PDF. Uzbek text content preserved. File committed to feat/uzbek-translation branch.
